name: Pyocomon
description: A Bulb-type Lesser Digimon with a large flower blooming from its head. It is able to move by skilfully manoeuvring its root-like tentacles, and it can even float upwards into the air, albeit only to a small height. It is brimming with curiosity, and its restless movements make it look downright adorable. It has a habit of living together in flocks, and they may number from a few to even a few hundred depending on the flock.
